subcodes.first_line: O thou who hast turned thy face toward God! Though communication was interrupted for a time, yet the connection remaineth firm, for the unifying Word doth bind hearts together [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای متوجه الی الله هر چند مدتی بود مخابره منقطع ولی رابطه محکم زیرا کلمه جامعه قلوبرا
subcodes.subjects: @eulogies; reminiscences, @spiritual communication; connections of the heart, @Manifestation of God as gardener; cultivator, @stories; anecdotes
